generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just puts our families at risk. We need strong alliances to deter threats and protect our way of life. Remember, freedom isn't free - it's paid for by the brave men and women who serve. #SupportOurAllies #NationalSecurity
